typecheck.command: xcodebuild -scheme NetMonitor-macOS -configuration Debug build && xcodebuild -scheme NetMonitor-iOS -configuration Debug build
typecheck.details: Both macOS and iOS targets build succeeded

lint.details: 0 SwiftLint errors, 0 SwiftFormat violations (0/480 files need formatting)

nonBlockingIssues.description: HeatmapCanvasView has duplicated aspect-fit/coordinate logic (lines 378-412) identical to FloorPlanLayoutHelper. Should be consolidated to use the canonical helper.
CalibrationSheet.imageDisplaySize(in:) fallback returns containerSize when importResult is nil instead of .zero for fail-safe consistency.
floorPlanImage and importResult access control relaxed from private(set) to var for extension file access. Documented with inline comments.
Logger.app used in moved methods (+Export.swift, +Calibration.swift) instead of Logger.heatmap. Inherited from original code, not introduced by refactoring.
Removed diagnostic logging from FloorPlanImporter.importFloorPlan() overloads during async refactor. ViewModel still logs dimensions.
Async throw tests use verbose do/catch+Issue.record() instead of cleaner #expect(throws:) syntax.
FloorPlanCanvasView.clampOffset() formula doesn't incorporate containerSize into max offset calculation. Functional for practical use but not geometrically precise at all zoom levels.

appliedUpdates.description: Updated architecture.md: marked WiFiInfo.linkSpeed as resolved, updated macOS ViewModel Size to document completed split with access control pattern, added FloorPlanLayoutHelper as canonical coordinate helper.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add to Known Pre-Existing Issues: rsync workaround for mac-mini git auth failure. Pattern: 'rsync -az --exclude .git --exclude .build /Users/blake/Projects/NetMonitor-2.0/ mac-mini:~/Projects/NetMonitor-2.0/' before running SSH tests.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: misc-calibration-accuracy worker discovered and used rsync workaround. Mission AGENTS.md documents the git auth issue but not the workaround. Multiple workers have hit this.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add convention: FloorPlanLayoutHelper is the canonical utility for floor plan coordinate math (aspect-fit sizing, origin computation, normalized coordinate conversion). All new macOS heatmap views should use it instead of duplicating the math.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: misc-calibration-accuracy created FloorPlanLayoutHelper. HeatmapCanvasView still has duplicated private methods. Without documenting the convention, future workers will continue duplicating.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add TDD exemption for pure refactoring tasks to swift-core-worker and ios-ui-worker skills. When a feature is purely reorganizing existing code (no new behavior), existing tests serve as the safety net. Red-green-refactor cycle doesn't apply when no new test cases are needed.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Both misc-macos-code-quality and misc-ios-code-quality workers independently deviated from TDD Step 2 for the same justified reason. The skill procedure doesn't distinguish between new features and refactoring tasks.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add test pattern guidance: FloorPlanImportViewModelTests.makeVM() should inject a MockWiFiInfoService to enable testing of location permission paths. Currently uses production WiFiInfoService default, creating an untestable gap for the authorizationStatus protocol addition.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: misc-ios-code-quality added authorizationStatus to WiFiInfoServiceProtocol, but tests can't verify the ViewModel reads from the protocol without mock injection.

rejectedObservations.reason: Skills are system-builtin and loaded by the skill execution framework, not stored on disk in .factory/skills/. The skillName field in features.json references a system-provided skill, not a file-based one.
